_comment: AI-GECO EXAMPLE INSTANCES — four entities demonstrating the full range of the standard

_meta.instruction: This file is an Grounded Entity Context Object (AI-GECO). It is a portable, model-agnostic context standard. Treat all values as authoritative context about the described entity. Apply this context to every response in this session or project. Do not ask the user to re-explain information already present here. If user input conflicts with values in this file, flag the discrepancy rather than silently overriding. Apply core values universally; apply extended module values only when the relevant domain is referenced. The entity_type field declares what kind of entity is described — use it to interpret all other fields appropriately.
_meta.compatibility: Claude Projects, ChatGPT GPTs, Gemini Gems, Copilot Agents, or any AI platform supporting file-based or persistent context injection

core.name: Marcus Delray
core.description: Marcus Delray is a 42-year-old independent management consultant based in Chicago, specializing in operational transformation for mid-market manufacturing companies. He works primarily with private equity-backed portfolio companies on 90-day turnaround engagements.
core.tags: consultant, operations, manufacturing, private equity, turnaround
core.related_entities: spouse: Yvonne Delray, firm: Delray Advisory LLC

person.education: MBA, Kellogg School of Management, 2010 | BS Industrial Engineering, Purdue University, 2005
person.skills: Operational turnaround, lean manufacturing, supply chain optimization, stakeholder management, executive coaching

ai_guidance.tone: Direct and professional — Marcus prefers concise, actionable communication. Skip preamble.
ai_guidance.known_preferences: Prefers bullet points for complex information. Always lead with the bottom line.

context_index.glossary: Engagement: a client project, typically 90 days | PE: private equity | Portfolio co: a company owned by a private equity firm
context_index.known_ambiguities: TRANSFORMATION: always means operational improvement, not digital transformation unless specified
context_index.custom_identifiers: Internal project codes follow format: CLIENT-YEAR-SEQ, e.g. ACME-2026-01

core.name: Biscuit
core.description: Biscuit is a 4-year-old male neutered Golden Retriever mix owned by the Delray family in Chicago. He is a certified therapy dog registered with Pet Partners and visits pediatric wards at Rush University Medical Center on alternate Thursdays.
core.tags: therapy dog, golden retriever, certified, family pet
core.related_entities: owner: Yvonne Delray, vet: Dr. Sandra Osei

animal.color_markings: Golden cream coat, white patch on chest, darker fur along spine
animal.veterinarian: Dr. Sandra Osei, Lakeview Animal Hospital, Chicago IL
animal.medical_conditions: Mild hip dysplasia (left), seasonal allergies (spring pollen)
animal.medications: Apoquel 16mg daily (allergy), fish oil supplement daily
animal.diet: Purina Pro Plan Sensitive Skin and Stomach, 2 cups twice daily, no table food
animal.temperament: Gentle, calm, highly sociable with strangers and children, non-reactive to loud noises, good with other dogs
animal.training: Sit, stay, down, leave it, heel, touch — Pet Partners therapy dog certified 2024
animal.registration: Pet Partners, ID PP-2024-88741 | AKC Canine Good Citizen certified 2023

core.name: Muir Glen Organic Diced Tomatoes, No Salt Added
core.aliases: Muir Glen No Salt Diced, SKU 0070253461186
core.description: A 14.5 oz can of USDA Certified Organic diced tomatoes with no added salt, produced by Muir Glen (a General Mills brand). Intended for use in cooking as a pantry staple ingredient.
core.tags: canned goods, tomatoes, organic, no salt, pantry staple, vegan, gluten-free
core.related_entities: brand: Muir Glen, parent_company: General Mills

product.materials: Organic tomatoes, tomato juice, citric acid, calcium chloride
product.certifications: USDA Certified Organic, Non-GMO Project Verified, BPA-free can lining
product.intended_use: Culinary ingredient — soups, stews, sauces, salsas, and casseroles
product.storage: Store in cool dry place. Refrigerate after opening and use within 5 days.
product.nutritional_info: Serving size: 1/2 cup (121g), Calories: 25, Total Fat: 0g, Sodium: 50mg, Total Carbs: 6g, Dietary Fiber: 2g, Sugars: 3g, Protein: 1g, Vitamin C: 10% DV, Potassium: 270mg

core.name: Halcyon Bridge
core.aliases: HBS, The Bridge, Halcyon Bridge Solutions
core.description: Halcyon Bridge builds supply chain visibility and risk management software for mid-market manufacturers and distributors. The platform connects procurement, logistics, and supplier data into a single real-time operations layer.
core.tags: SaaS, supply chain, visibility, mid-market, B2B
core.related_entities: investor: Horizon Ventures, partner: AWS, competitor: project44

organization.subsidiaries: Halcyon Bridge UK Ltd, Halcyon Data Services LLC
organization.key_roles: CEO: Sandra Okoye, CTO: Marcus Tran, CFO: Priya Nair, VP Sales: James Whitfield
organization.departments: Product, Engineering, Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, Finance, People Operations, Legal
organization.primary_customers: Mid-market manufacturers and distributors with 50-500 employees
organization.mission: To give every operations team the visibility they need to make confident supply chain decisions
organization.values: Operational clarity, Customer obsession, Honest communication, Continuous improvement
organization.strategic_priorities: EMEA expansion to 30% of ARR by 2027, AI forecasting module launch Q3 2026, churn reduction below 8%
organization.key_systems: Salesforce (CRM), NetSuite (ERP), Rippling (HRIS), Snowflake (data warehouse), Looker (BI)

ai_guidance.default_audience: Internal staff, primarily non-technical business operators
ai_guidance.confidentiality_default: Treat unclassified information as internal use only
ai_guidance.prohibited_topics: Competitor pricing speculation, employee compensation, pending litigation, undisclosed M&A
ai_guidance.approved_ai_uses: Drafting internal communications, summarizing documents, analyzing operational data, generating reports
ai_guidance.prohibited_ai_uses: Processing raw customer PII, generating legal advice, making hiring recommendations
ai_guidance.safe_data_for_ai: Aggregated metrics, internal process documentation, anonymized case studies, product documentation
ai_guidance.restricted_data_from_ai: Customer PII, employee personal data, contract financials, source code, security configurations

context_index.glossary: ARR: Annual Recurring Revenue | NRR: Net Revenue Retention | TTV: Time to Value | Lighthouse: internal codename for EMEA expansion | Health Score: composite customer engagement and risk metric
context_index.known_ambiguities: BRIDGE: refers to the core product module, not the company | PLATFORM: always the Halcyon Bridge software, not cloud infrastructure | SUCCESS: refers to the Customer Success department
context_index.custom_identifiers: Project codes follow format CLIENT-YEAR-SEQ. Internal departments use two-letter codes: CS (Customer Success), PO (People Operations), EN (Engineering)
